How to make a nice PPT

imageGen.title: Image Generation
imageGen.description: Qwen VLo empowers your creative projects by turning ideas into stunning visuals—now with deeper understanding and precise control. Edit images, transform styles, generate from scratch, or combine multiple elements—all powered by a unified model that understands and creates.

deepResearch.title: Deep Research
deepResearch.description: Deep Research is an intelligent agent system that leverages vast information on the internet to perform multi-step searches, analysis, and summaries to complete complex tasks.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Web Dev enables web developers to create both beautiful and practical websites through natural language prompts alone. Simply describe your vision, and you'll get a complete, ready-to-use webpage with clean code and modern design—no programming or design skills required.

deepThink.title: Deep Thinking
deepThink.description: Qwen excels at advanced reasoning and problem-solving. This enables it to handle complex questions clearly and accurately, providing comprehensive, logical, and actionable solutions.

search.title: Search
search.description: Leverage Qwen's intelligent search capabilities to quickly find answers, resources, or inspiration from the web. With advanced filtering and contextual understanding, Qwen delivers precise results that match your queries. Whether researching topics, finding recipes, or discovering new trends, Qwen ensures the most relevant information is at your fingertips, helping you make more informed decisions.

multimodal.title: Multimodal Understanding
multimodal.description: Qwen possesses powerful multimodal understanding capabilities, able to simultaneously process and analyze various types of information including text, images, audio, and video.

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B
models.description: Qwen3.6 series 35B-A3B native vision-language model, enhanced agentic coding capabilities with comprehensive breakthroughs in code reasoning and spatial intelligence.

models.name: Qwen3.5-122B-A10B
models.description: Qwen3.5 series 122B-A10B native vision-language model, integrating linear attention mechanism with sparse mixture-of-experts for higher reasoning efficiency.

models.name: Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking
models.description: Equipped with STEMA mathematical problem-solving capabilities, outstanding general image and video understanding, multimodal Agent capabilities reaching SOTA level.

models.name: Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct
models.description: Comprehensively enhanced image/video understanding, spatial perception, and universal recognition; capable of 2D/3D visual localization for complex real-world tasks.

models.name: Qwen-Omni-Turbo-Realtime
models.description: Qwen-Omni series models support input of multiple modalities including video, audio, images, and text, with audio and text output.

models.name: Qwen3-Coder-480B
models.description: Code generation model based on Qwen3 with powerful Coding Agent capabilities, coding performance reaches SOTA among open-source models.

models.name: Qwen3-235B-A22B
models.description: Open-source thinking model based on Qwen3, with significant improvements in logical capabilities, general abilities, and knowledge understanding, suitable for high-difficulty reasoning scenarios.

models.name: QwQ-32B
models.description: QwQ reasoning model trained on Qwen2.5-32B, significantly enhancing model reasoning capabilities with core metrics approaching DeepSeek-R1 full version.

models.name: VQV-72B-Preview
models.description: OVIO experimental research model developed by Qwen team, focusing on enhancing visual reasoning capabilities, especially in mathematical reasoning domains.
